decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 9/10 sessions consistent. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 270/8227 lines reworked (3.3%, 19/50). 0/93 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 9.3% (1/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 38. Session 8: 37 (process:20 efficiency:11 ttfw:6). Session 9: 43 (process:20 efficiency:15 ttfw:8). Session 10: 42 (process:20 efficiency:15 ttfw:7). Session 11: 28 (process:20 efficiency:6 ttfw:2). Session 12: 38 (process:20 efficiency:12 ttfw:6).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 417/417 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Adapters use 2 different interfaces. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
